strengths: Extensive experience with the primary tech stack, including TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB.

concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, though he possesses deep expertise in Node.js and TypeScript.

response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer whose background strongly aligns with the core requirements. He possesses deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, alongside a proven commitment to software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD. Crucially, his recent role involves AI agent infrastructure, fulfilling a specific and complex requirement for this position. While he lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest, his extensive background in building test runners and adapting to various backend tools makes him an outstanding candidate who will easily bridge those minor gaps.
